name: CTSuite
description: CTSuite is a smart metering system that allows utility customers to pre-pay for water and monitor usage via a mobile app.

taxonomy.sub_category: CTSuite Updated on February 4, 2024 · Created on October 26, 2022 CTSuite CTSuite is a smart metering system that allows utility customers to pre-pay for water and monitor usage via a mobile app. Developed By CityTaps Tested By CityTaps Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description CTSuite , manufactured and distributed by CityTaps , is a pay-as-you-go smart metering system implemented by the local utility consisting of a smart water meter called CTMeter and a CTCloud billing software. The suite allows for accurate consumption measurement and data tracking, leak, and tampering identification, and simplified purchasing of water. Customers have full visibility of their usage history and remaining credit balance via the CityTaps mobile app, and they can also use the Mobile Money app to reload funds at any time. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 9: Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure Market Suggested Retail Price $0.23 Market Suggested Retail Price (Secondary Currency) 127 FCFA Target Users (Target Impact Group) Public Sector Agencies Distributors / Implementing Organizations CityTaps Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include JanaJal Safe Water ATM , Sarvajal Water ATM , and Grundfos AQtap . Countries Burkina Faso, Ecuador, Kenya, Namibia, Niger, Rwanda, Senegal Manufacturing/Building Method Unknown Intellectural Property Type Patent User Provision Model Users can obtain the product from utilities using the CTSuite smart metering system, for which the utilities subscribe to CityTaps. Distributions to Date Status 3,768 CTMeters distributed as of 2021. Description of system Smart Metering System Integrated treatment (yes/no) No System flow rate (L/min) Unknown Maximum number of customers served 3,768 CTMeters distributed as of 2021 Compatible water sources Urban supply water Design Specifications Utilities that use CityTaps CTSuite install weather-proof smart meter devices at the residences of paying customers. Customers can load funds or credit onto their accounts via the mobile app or USSD mobile phone services. Customers get notified when their credit is low or depleted, and they can add more funds. The software is designed to allow utilities to monitor leaks, fraud, blocked meters, and history of water consumption while also improving cash inflow balancing with expenses, increasing OPEX savings by 10-20% and making collection ratios 100% with no customer debt. Consumption data is transmitted via either radio gateways or the Internet of Things to mobile devices every 30 minutes. Installation requires no specific tools and is simple. Product Schematics Technical Support Training is provided by the manufacturer during implementation, then utilities are responsible for maintenance. Regular software updates, automatic meter readings, and data hosting are all services for which the utility subscribes from CityTaps, paid for on a per unit per month basis. Replacement Components Multi-jet water meter (R100), motor, battery Lifecycle 10 years Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The manufacturer designed meters to be extremely weather-resistant and can operate in direct sunlight, high temperatures, and fine dust environments. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety No known safety hazards are related to this product. Complementary Technical Systems None Academic Research and References L. Savaëte, G. A. Landel, and M.
